synopsis: It began as a simple planetfall on Ord Mantell for some rest and relaxation. Han wanted to gamble his reward money into a sum large enough to pay off Jabba the Hutt, while Leia preferred more sophisticated entertainment. But now the princess is missing, and a knee-high droid is challenging the smuggler to a transgalactic race, with Leia's life as the prize. In this branching, choose-your-path adventure, the reader guides Han Solo, mercenary smuggler and pilot extraordinaire, through a fast-paced tale of quick wits and tough decisions, sometimes analyzing the situation as Han sees it, sometimes trusting his flying skills, and sometimes leaving his destiny to luck itself.
title: Scoundrel's Luck
